Name: Username
WindowHandler.Title: Pet Passport
PetDev.Title: Pet Nicknames Development
PetList.Title: Pet List
ClearButton.Label: Hold "Left Ctrl" + "Left Shift" to delete an entry.
ClearButton.ColourLabel: Hold "Left Ctrl" + "Left Shift" to clear the colour.
UserListElement.WarningIPC:
This user is temporarily added via an
external plugin and will not be saved.
UserListElement.WarningOldUser:
This user is from your old save file.
Please meet them in game so it can update.
IslandWarning: Pet Nicknames was unable to resolve the owner of this island. Please rejoin this island.
ShareWindow.ExportError:
No data available.
You need to log in to a character to export your data.
ShareWindow.ExportSuccess:
Data successfully exported to your clipboard.
Make sure to paste this data elsewhere.
Config.Title: Settings
Config.UISettings.UIScale.Header.Title: Custom UI Scale
Config.Toggle: Quick Buttons toggle instead of open.
Config.BattleChat: Show nicknames in the Battle Chat.
Config.Notebook: Show nicknames in the Minion Notebook.
Config.ActionLog: Show nicknames in the Action List.
Config.Partylist: Show nicknames on the Party List.
Config.OldBarStyle: Use the old Quick Bar Style.
Config.DebugMode.Help: Hold "Left Ctrl" + "Left Shift" to interact with this button.
Config.IslandWarning: Show a warning upon unresolved Island Owner.
Config.PartyCutoff: Allow Long Casts to be Truncated.
Config.PartyCutoff.Help:
Your castbars might go out of bounds in the party list, PetNicknames worsens this issue.
With this setting enabled the castbars will automatically truncate to not overflow the partylist.

(This is a vanilla bug).
Config.Penumbra.AttachToPCP: Attach Pet Nicknames data to Penumbra .pcp files.
Config.Penumbra.ReadFromPCP: Read Pet Nicknames data from Penumbra .pcp files.
Kofi.Title: Ko-fi
Kofi.Line1: This is about real life money.
Kofi.Line2: It will be used to my cat toys!
Command.Petname:
Opens the Pet Rename window.
        Type '/petname help' for information on naming via command.
ShareWindow.Explain1: You can export your petnames and send them to a friend.
ShareWindow.Explain2: Your friend can in turn import them.
